title: Embedded Software Intern
description: I designed and implemented a Python-based client-server application utilizing TCP communication to manage USB device access. I developed a VID/PID whitelist system for USB devices to improve data security and deployed it to over 50% of company systems, significantly improving overall security measures.

title: SDE Intern
description: I overhauled a critical, real-time UPI data pipeline by resolving production bugs and memory leaks in its Haskell services. By refactoring the core framework and optimizing the ClickHouse database, I reduced data latency from hours to seconds and architected a new pipeline branch for a major banking client, enhancing system-wide reliability and performance.
